summary: The diff shows 45 modified files and 0 added/removed files, representing a revert attempt toward Version 9. However, the diff summary is truncated and only shows partial content for 20 files while noting 25 additional modified files were omitted due to limits. The visible files (backend/main.mo, App.tsx, various admin components, and public components) appear consistent with a Version 9 baseline — they do not show Instagram/social feed cleanup, social media manager, dynamic socialPlatforms CMS extension, or social share buttons in Lightbox. The Lightbox.tsx visible content shows no social share buttons, the AdminLayout shows no social media manager nav item, the Footer shows only Instagram/Facebook/Pinterest static icons (no dynamic socialPlatforms), and App.tsx has no social media manager route. However, because 25 modified files are omitted from the diff, it is impossible to fully verify that ALL files match Version 9 state exactly.

missing_requirements.requirement: All frontend and backend files must be restored to their exact Version 9 state; no post-Version-9 changes present.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary explicitly states 25 modified files were omitted due to limits. It is impossible to verify that all omitted files (which may include CMSContext, Settings page, and other critical files) fully reflect the Version 9 state and contain no post-Version-9 features such as the social media manager, dynamic socialPlatforms CMS extension, or social share buttons.
